name: zhiyuan-agent
description: 智元Agent - 中文原生桌面端 AI Agent 平台

scripts.dev:electron: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH wait-on tcp:5173 && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && mkdir -p dist/desktop/preload dist/lib/persona && cp desktop/preload/index.cjs dist/desktop/preload/index.cjs && cp lib/*.json dist/lib/ && cp -R lib/persona/*-templates dist/lib/persona/ && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.start: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH electron .
scripts.build: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && mkdir -p dist/desktop/preload dist/lib/persona dist/lib/i18n && cp desktop/preload/index.cjs dist/desktop/preload/index.cjs && cp lib/*.json dist/lib/ && cp -R lib/persona/*-templates dist/lib/persona/ && cp -R lib/i18n/locales dist/lib/i18n/ && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH vite build
scripts.pack: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npx --yes electron-builder@^25.1.8 --dir
scripts.dist: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npx --yes electron-builder@^25.1.8
scripts.dist:mac: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npx --yes electron-builder@^25.1.8 --mac dmg
scripts.dist:win: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npx --yes electron-builder@^25.1.8 --win nsis
scripts.dist:linux: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npx --yes electron-builder@^25.1.8 --linux AppImage deb
scripts.cli: PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH npm run build && PATH=$PWD/.local-node/bin:$PATH node dist/cli/index.js
